title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 720 至 1110 行，共 1554 行) ---
 720 |                 tool_name = msg.get("name", "unknown")
 721 |                 tool_counts[tool_name] = tool_counts.get(tool_name, 0) + 1
 722 | 
 723 |         for tool_name, count in tool_counts.items():
 724 |             tools_used.append(ToolUsage(
 725 |                 tool_name=tool_name,
 726 |                 parameters={},
 727 |                 result_summary=f"调用了 {count} 次",
 728 |                 timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat(),
 729 |                 success=True,
 730 |                 importance=0.5
 731 |             ))
 732 | 
 733 |         # 生成摘要文本（改进版：提取关键帧的实际内容）
 734 |         summary_parts = []
 735 |         task_goal = None
 736 |         key_decisions = []
 737 | 
 738 |         # 1. 提取用户消息（任务目标）
 739 |         user_messages = [msg for msg in messages if msg.get("role") == "user"]
 740 |         if user_messages:
 741 |             first_user_msg = user_messages[0].get("content", "")
 742 |             if isinstance(first_user_msg, str):
 743 |                 task_goal = first_user_msg[:100]  # 提取前100字符作为任务目标
 744 |                 summary_parts.append(f"任务: {task_goal}")
 745 | 
 746 |         # 2. 提取关键消息的实际内容
 747 |         key_content_count = 0
 748 |         for msg in messages:
 749 |             if key_content_count >= 5:  # 只提取前5条关键内容
 750 |                 break
 751 | 
 752 |             content = msg.get("content", "")
 753 |             if not isinstance(content, str):
 754 |                 continue
 755 | 
 756 |             role = msg.get("role", "")
 757 | 
 758 |             # 提取错误消息
 759 |             if any(keyword in content for keyword in ["Error", "错误", "Exception", "失败", "Traceback"]):
 760 |                 error_preview = content[:80].replace("\n", " ").strip()
 761 |                 summary_parts.append(f"错误: {error_preview}...")
 762 |                 key_content_count += 1
 763 | 
 764 |             # 提取关键决策（assistant 消息中的关键内容）
 765 |             elif role == "assistant" and len(content) > 20:
 766 |                 # 检测关键决策关键词
 767 |                 decision_keywords = ["已完成", "已创建", "已修改", "成功", "完成", "建议", "决策", "选择"]
 768 |                 if any(keyword in content for keyword in decision_keywords):
 769 |                     decision_preview = content[:80].replace("\n", " ").strip()
 770 |                     summary_parts.append(f"进展: {decision_preview}...")
 771 |                     key_decisions.append(decision_preview)
 772 |                     key_content_count += 1
 773 | 
 774 |         # 3. 统计数据作为补充
 775 |         stats_parts = []
 776 |         stats_parts.append(f"压缩了 {len(messages)} 条消息")
 777 |         if files_changed:
 778 |             stats_parts.append(f"{len(files_changed)} 个文件变更")
 779 |         if errors_encountered:
 780 |             stats_parts.append(f"{len(errors_encountered)} 个错误")
 781 |         if tools_used:
 782 |             stats_parts.append(f"使用 {len(tools_used)} 种工具")
 783 | 
 784 |         summary_text = "\n".join(summary_parts + ["统计: " + "，".join(stats_parts)])
 785 | 
 786 |         # 如果没有提取到任何关键内容，使用简化版摘要
 787 |         if not summary_parts:
 788 |             summary_text = f"使用{strategy.value}策略压缩了 {len(messages)} 条消息（无关键内容提取）"
 789 | 
 790 |         # 🔥 新增：检测任务状态（优先使用真实 Plan 状态）
 791 |         task_status = "in_progress"  # 默认值
 792 | 
 793 |         # 🔥🔥🔥 关键修复：优先检查 Plan 状态（真实数据源）
 794 |         if self.plan_manager and hasattr(self.plan_manager, 'is_plan_complete'):
 795 |             if self.plan_manager.is_plan_complete():
 796 |                 # Plan 已全部完成，强制使用 "completed" 状态
 797 |                 task_status = "completed"
 798 |                 print(f"   [Phase 3] ✅ 检测到 Plan 已完成，状态同步为 completed")
 799 |             elif self.plan_manager.has_incomplete_tasks():
 800 |                 # Plan 还有未完成的步骤，强制使用 "in_progress"
 801 |                 task_status = "in_progress"
 802 |                 print(f"   [Phase 3] ⏳ Plan 尚未完成，状态保持 in_progress"...
